subject: Add driver for Namco Guncon 3 (#20)
author: Nolan Nicholson
provenance_doc_ref: docs/patch-provenance.md:359, Class D (carry) — confirmed absent from 6.18.38

impact.effect_if_absent: Namco GunCon3 lightgun (VID:PID 0x0b9a:0x0800) would not be recognized by the kernel; no input device created. Userspace lightgun support code in Main_MiSTer (input.cpp:5373-5383) would never activate.

userspace_coupling.interface: USB HID device detection and calibration via kernel input device; Main_MiSTer recognizes VID/PID 0x0b9a:0x0800 and applies calibration guncal[0-3] values; input events (ABS_X, ABS_Y, button codes BTN_A through BTN_TL2) are consumed by lightgun frame-counting logic
userspace_coupling.main_mister_ref: Main_MiSTer/input.cpp:5373-5383 (explicit VID/PID match for guncon3 with hardcoded calibration); input.cpp:6000-6010, 6012-6024 (lightgun coordinate mapping and grace-period logic for off-screen coordinates)

forward_port.effort: minimal — carried patch 0011-hid-guncon3.patch documents forward-port from 5.15 to 6.18.38: usb_maxpacket() lost 3rd (direction) parameter; sprintf→strscpy; printk(KERN_*)→pr_*(); removed uninitialized path buffer; added input_register_device() return value check. Changes are mechanical and low-risk.

license_provenance: GPL-2.0 (declared in driver header; SPDX in carried patch). Author: Beardypig <guncon@beardypig.com>; note includes decode fixes from pcnimdock (https://github.com/pcnimdock/guncon3).
notes: CARRIED with high confidence. Device is NOT in vanilla 6.18.38 (verified: no hid-guncon3.c, no USB_PRODUCT_ID_NAMCO_GUNCON3 in hid-ids.h). Carried patch 0011-hid-guncon3.patch is a clean 5.15→6.18.38 forward-port documented in the patch header. Userspace coupling is explicit and strong: Main_MiSTer/input.cpp:5373-5383 hardcodes VID/PID detection and applies per-device calibration guncal values (initial range -32768..32767 for both X and Y). Failure mode is SILENT: device quietly becomes unavailable if driver is dropped; no build/boot error. Disposition agrees with patch-provenance.md Class D (carry). Author Nolan Nicholson is confirmed PR contributor (PR #20 in fork). Also folded in: commit 9b9aebfac (warning fix by Sorgelig, 2022-04-13) — carried patch header notes this as merged.
